title: The Road Home
tagline: WordPress-charity-default with weak hierarchy and a centennial story it never tells. Variants make the institution visible without rebranding it.

direction.phrase: Brand-faithful Mode A — palette and typography pinned to captured surface. Presales tool. Refresh, not rebrand.
movements: banner-color semantic: ambiguous → explicit (centennial-red reserved to TRH-100)

originalCritique: WordPress-charity-default treatment on top of a strong civic brand. The hero text floats over a photo with no scrim; the IA collides (three-doors lockup repeats inside the body); CTAs fragment; type scale is ad-hoc; two banner colors mean two different things. The page reads like a template — the institution and the centennial it carries are nowhere visible.

variants.name: Conservative refresh
variants.thesis: All seed dimensions recede; brand mannerism dominates verbatim. Hero gains a scrim, type ladders to 1.25, the three-doors IA is preserved verbatim. Lowest-risk option.
variants.fix: All seed dimensions recede; brand mannerism dominates verbatim. The hero earns a scrim. Type snaps to a 1.25 modular ladder. The three-doors IA is preserved verbatim — but each door gets its own pill CTA instead of the fragmented collection the live site has. The lowest-risk refresh — the customer's design team will recognise every move as theirs.

variants.name: Compositional shift
variants.thesis: Tabloid IA logic — front-page priority, classified-section logic, "above the fold" hierarchy — reorganises the page. Same palette and type; different IA.
variants.fix: Same palette, same type. Tabloid IA logic — front-page priority, classified-section logic, "above the fold" hierarchy — reorganises the home. The three-doors lockup becomes a single front-page index; the centennial story moves above the donor band; each audience gets one declarative ALL-CAPS headline instead of a four-up tile cluster.

variants.name: Bold direction
variants.thesis: 1930s civic-monumental + Plaster-cast solidity push display type and surface treatment further. Larger 1930s-civic-poster scale on the hero; flat-banner monumental treatment for sections.
variants.fix: 1930s civic-monumental + Plaster-cast solidity push display type and surface treatment further. Hero scale jumps to civic-poster proportions; section markers become flat-banner monumental treatments — the brand's existing ALL-CAPS headlines and saturated road-deep colour finally have weight to carry. Same palette, same type, more commitment.

variants.name: v2 · T1 · Polish
variants.thesis: T1 faithful refinement. All five home-improvements applied with extreme care; nothing else moved. The brand-team's preferred safe-baseline.
variants.fix: The most refined version of the current site. All five home-improvements applied with extreme care — and nothing else moved. The 211 panel rises above the fold; impact stats become quantitative anchors; CTAs gain action-specific verbs; the centennial signal surfaces as a trust anchor; flat hierarchy gets typeset corrections. Brand mannerism survives verbatim. The brand-team's preferred safe-baseline.

variants.name: v2 · T1 · Distill
variants.thesis: Half the sections, twice the clarity. Mission-forward by reduction. Five sections collapse to three (hero+211, impact+pillars merged, stories) plus footer.
variants.fix: Half the sections, twice the clarity. Mission-forward by reduction. Five captured sections collapse to three: hero+211 merged into one above-fold band, impact+pillars merged into one credibility band, stories. The flat hierarchy is solved by removing what didn't earn space — not by re-typesetting it.

variants.name: v2 · T1 · Quieter polish
variants.thesis: NYT-public-service register, dignified-institutional. Library-quiet rhythm, single-column flows, pale teal-tinted parchment ground, photography captioned not cropped.
variants.fix: NYT-public-service register, dignified-institutional. Library-quiet rhythm. Single-column flows. Pale teal-tinted parchment ground (still inside the captured palette). Photography captioned, not cropped. The brand's existing tone moves one notch toward institutional gravitas without becoming editorial.

variants.name: v2 · T1 · Typeset
variants.thesis: Type is the design driver. Hero is a typeset poster: REFUGE / RESOURCES / RELIEF stacked at display scale with deliberate optical kerning. The 211 panel sits below as a typographic frieze.
variants.fix: Type is the design driver. Hero becomes a typeset poster: REFUGE / RESOURCES / RELIEF stacked at display scale with deliberate optical kerning. The 211 panel sits below as a typographic frieze. The brand's existing all-caps signature finally has the scale to do the work it implies.

variants.name: v2 · T1 · Layout
variants.thesis: Same content; fundamentally different composition. A 12-column asymmetric grid with a left-edge centennial spine, the hero on cols 1-7, the 211 panel anchored right.
variants.fix: Same content; fundamentally different composition. A 12-column asymmetric grid with a left-edge centennial spine. Hero spans cols 1-7; the 211 panel anchors right. Impact stats sit in a numerical strip beneath the hero. The page reads as designed, not laid out.

variants.name: v2 · T2 · Bolder
variants.thesis: Confident-institutional moved one notch toward expressive. Larger type, deeper colour confidence, full-bleed photography moments. The brand's existing trait amplified, not replaced.
variants.fix: Confident-institutional moved one notch toward expressive. Larger type. Deeper colour confidence (saturated road-deep extends to one full-bleed band). Photography earns full-bleed moments instead of card-cropped tiles. The brand's existing trait is amplified — louder is the point — without becoming editorial-airy.

variants.name: v2 · T2 · Quieter
variants.thesis: Almost meditative. Library-quiet rhythm. Single-column body running the page; photography full-bleed and captioned. The brand's gravitas amplified through restraint.
variants.fix: Almost meditative. Library-quiet rhythm. A single-column body runs the page. Photography is full-bleed and captioned, not gridded. The brand's gravitas amplifies through restraint — the four-star nonprofit becomes harder to scroll past because the page asks you to slow down.

variants.name: v2 · T2 · Delight
variants.thesis: Small joys, never glib, never twee. A hand-drawn ink underline under HOME in the hero. Story cards lift gently on hover and reveal one warm composite-portrait detail.
variants.fix: Small joys, never glib, never twee. A hand-drawn ink underline under HOME in the hero. Story cards lift gently on hover and reveal one warm composite-portrait detail. The brand's empathetic register finally has motion that matches it — institutional warmth without becoming casual.

variants.name: v2 · T2 · Adapt
variants.thesis: Layout responds to content type. The 211 panel is a phone-card affordance with tap-to-call rows. Program pillars become a disclosure chooser. Each section composes itself per its content shape.
variants.fix: Layout responds to content type. The 211 panel renders as a phone-card affordance with tap-to-call rows. Program pillars become a disclosure chooser (details on demand). Each section composes itself per its content shape — the page stops being a stack of identical bands and starts being a tool.

variants.name: v2 · T2 · Colorize
variants.thesis: Civic Teal deployed as a system, not an accent. No new hues — every variant uses the captured palette, but V10 commits to a captured colour per section.
variants.fix: Civic Teal deployed as a system, not an accent. No new hues — every section commits to a captured colour as ground (road-deep, road-mid, shelter-grey, parchment). The captured palette finally reads as a system instead of a single accent on a stark-white page.

variants.name: v2 · T3 · Memoir-led
variants.thesis: Hero leads with a single full-bleed portrait — Ray, drawn from the captured archive — accompanied by a long-form composite-character paragraph. The strongest narrative asset on the page finally tells a story.
variants.fix: Hero leads with a single full-bleed portrait. Ray, drawn from the captured archive, accompanied by a long-form composite-character paragraph. The captured "Housing Stories" — six B&W stock portraits with first-name labels and no story copy — collapse to one composed memoir. The strongest narrative asset on the page finally tells a story.

variants.name: v2 · T3 · Service-led
variants.thesis: 211 emergency contact and a "Find help" router occupy the entire above-fold band. Brand storytelling, programs, and impact surface below. Closer to a Government services page than a charity homepage.
variants.fix: 211 emergency contact and a "Find help" router occupy the entire above-fold band. Brand storytelling, programs, and impact surface below. The page reads closer to a government services page than a charity homepage — the IA-priority finally matches the mission. A person in crisis arriving at the site doesn't scroll past the donate ask first.

variants.name: v2 · T3 · Documentary
variants.thesis: Photo-essay register. The captured B&W portraits are treated with a duotone-teal overlay (deep-teal shadows, paper-cream highlights) and given the page's hierarchy.
variants.fix: Photo-essay register. The captured B&W portraits are treated with a duotone-teal overlay (deep-teal shadows, paper-cream highlights) — staying inside the brand palette while gaining a register the brand has earned. The portraits get the page's hierarchy; copy and CTAs become caption.

variants.name: v2 · T3 · Centennial
variants.thesis: A century of unbroken civic service is the most asymmetric institutional asset TRH has. The variant elevates it: hero is a timeline running 1923 → 2026, anchored by the centennial mark.
variants.fix: A century of unbroken civic service is the most asymmetric institutional asset TRH has. V14 elevates it: hero becomes a timeline running 1923 → 2026, anchored by the centennial mark currently buried in the header chrome. The page's primary trust signal becomes temporal — "100 years of doing this" — instead of typographic.

variants.name: v2 · T3 · Impact-led
variants.thesis: The most credibility-bearing numbers TRH has — 1,550+ housed, 60% case-managed, 3,491 assisted — lead the page. They are the hero. Programs frame them.
variants.fix: The most credibility-bearing numbers TRH has lead the page. 1,550+ in housing, 60% case-managed, 3,491 services rendered. They are the hero. Programs frame them. The four-star charity's strongest trust signal renders with the typographic weight it deserves — not as a sentence inside a paragraph block.

variants.name: v2 · T4 · Bolder + Typeset
variants.thesis: Type-driven loud. A poster-scale display moment in the hero that fills the viewport with a single typeset wordmark. Restraint everywhere else.
variants.fix: Type-driven loud. A poster-scale display moment in the hero fills the viewport with a single typeset wordmark — REFUGE, set in the brand's all-caps signature at civic-poster proportions. Restraint everywhere else: small body, single-column, captured palette held tight. The brand commits once, then steps back.

variants.name: v2 · T4 · Quieter + Distill
variants.thesis: Minimalism with conscience. Three sections total. Photography dominant. Copy reduced to load-bearing only — the mission line, the three numbers, the call to act.
variants.fix: Minimalism with conscience. Three sections total. Photography dominant. Copy reduced to load-bearing only — the mission line, the three numbers, the call to act. The page reads as a four-star institution that has nothing to prove and doesn't try.

variants.name: v2 · T4 · Animate + Delight
variants.thesis: Kinetic small joys. The hero tagline reveals word-by-word with a typed-in cadence. The pulse on the help-line indicator gently breathes. Story cards lift on hover.
variants.fix: Kinetic small joys. The hero tagline reveals word-by-word with a typed-in cadence. The help-line pulse gently breathes. Story cards lift on hover and reveal a composite-portrait detail. The brand's empathetic warmth gains motion that's institutional, never twee.

variants.name: v2 · T4 · Overdrive + Colorize
variants.thesis: What if TRH committed fully. Maximum craft. The captured palette deployed as system across alternating section grounds. A scroll-tinted gradient fade between sections.
variants.fix: What if TRH committed fully. Maximum craft. The captured palette deploys as system across alternating section grounds. A scroll-tinted gradient fade between sections. Type at maximum scale. The most distinctive variant — answers "are we ready to be more distinctive?" with yes.

variants.name: v2 · T4 · Adapt + Layout
variants.thesis: Each section composes itself per its content shape. The 211 panel renders as a phone-keypad affordance. The program list renders as a chooser. Layout follows function.
variants.fix: Each section composes itself per its content shape. The 211 panel renders as a phone-keypad affordance. The program list renders as a chooser (segmented control). The impact strip becomes a quantitative dashboard. The home stops being a stack of identical bands and becomes a tool that knows what each section is for.
